hero.name: Azzam Adnan Abdalghani
hero.title: IT Engineer | Flutter & Mobile Developer | Full-Stack Developer | ERP Systems Specialist
hero.intro: A results-driven IT Engineer with hands-on expertise in delivering production-ready mobile applications using Flutter, architecture-driven backend systems, modern frontend interfaces, and automated DevOps infrastructure. Proven track record in administering enterprise ERP solutions and managing high-availability IT systems.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Education & Certifications
about.description: I'm a passionate IT Engineer with a clean-architecture approach to software development and a solid IT infrastructure background. I specialize in building scalable, production-ready applications and managing enterprise-level systems.
